items.title: Halliburton (HAL) Is Up 6.7% After First Fully Automated Offshore Well in Guyana - What's Changed
items.summary: In March 2026, Halliburton, together with ExxonMobil, Sekal, Noble and the Wells Alliance Guyana team, delivered the industry’s first fully automated geological well placement with complete rig automation in offshore Guyana, using LOGIX orchestration, EarthStar ultra-deep resistivity and Sekal’s DrillTronics in an integrated closed-loop system. items.title: Does Devon Energy’s (DVN) Cheaper, Longer Credit Line Quietly Reframe Its Balance Sheet Playbook?
items.summary: On March 24, 2026, Devon Energy Corporation amended its revolving credit facility, extending the maturity to March 24, 2031 and removing a 10 basis point SOFR credit spread adjustment, while renewing options for three additional one-year extensions subject to lender approval. This shift in borrowing terms modestly enhances Devon’s financial flexibility, potentially supporting its ability to sustain capital investment and balance sheet resilience through commodity cycles.
